description: Led automation, tooling, and quality engineering improvements across multiple products by building modular frameworks, CI-integrated reporting, and reusable infrastructure.
highlights: Designed and implemented a modular test automation framework covering frontend, backend, database, and performance testing across multiple products
Built CI/CD-integrated test pipelines and reporting systems, publishing results to shared platforms and enabling visibility into quality metrics
Developed reusable tooling and infrastructure to support cross-project test automation and data-driven quality analysis
Reviewed and guided automation and feature code, improving test design, reliability, and maintainability across the codebase
Collaborated with engineering teams to integrate testing into development workflows and improve overall system quality
